title: Pokebag Recipes
description: Adds crafting recipes for the pokebag item from the Pixelmon Mod
body:
This addon datapack for the [Pixelmon Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pixelmon) adds crafting recipes for the pixelmon pokebags. All 16 colours are supported by simply swapping the dye colour. 
Material requirements are as follows:
- 5x Leather
- 2x String
- 1x Pokeball
- 1x Dye

This datapack was designed for minecraft version 1.16.5 and pixelmon version 9.1.4.
